description: Identity documents, certificates, and government-issued services

certificates.note: State e-District portals for birth, death, caste, income, domicile certificates

general_rules: Always direct users to official .gov.in portals — never third-party agents
Most services available online via DigiLocker (https://digilocker.gov.in)
Common Service Centres (CSCs) available in rural areas for offline access
Fees vary by state for state-level certificates
All document updates require OTP on registered mobile number
For minors, parent/guardian documents are required

common_patterns.new_application: Identify → Gather documents → Apply online/offline → Track status → Collect
common_patterns.update_correction: Login to portal → Select update type → Upload proof → Pay fee → Track with URN
common_patterns.lost_duplicate: File FIR/police complaint (if needed) → Apply for duplicate via portal → Pay fee
common_patterns.linking: Visit issuing authority or use online portal → Authenticate with OTP/biometric → Confirm linking
common_patterns.verification_status: Use portal tracking with application/reference number → Check SMS/email updates

escalation.fourth: Approach local MP/MLA or district collector office
